title: Verify backup and restore independently
description: Prove that every supported durable INSIGHTS state can be backed up, verified, restored to a separate target, migrated, and activated without risking the current store.
target: 100% of supported backup and storage-version paths pass independent manifest, fingerprint, count, link, content, idempotency, deletion-state, permission, and integrity verification; 100% of corruption, omission, incompatibility, permission, space, cancellation, and activation faults leave the prior authoritative store unchanged.
load_condition: Empty, populated, maximum-retention, Restatement-chain, deletion, retry, prior-version, corrupted, truncated, wrong-owner, insufficient-space, and interrupted backup/restore candidates.
measurement: Automated backup-verify-restore and supported-version migration drills into separate targets, full normalized state comparisons, negative candidates, atomic activation fault injection, and post-restore operation replay.
rationale: A backup claim without independent restore proof would provide false confidence for retained financial evidence.
